verses.text: Topa aw, na heh laitak hong taii kei in la, lungso sa-in hong thuhilh kei in
Topa aw, thanem ka hih manin kei tungah dikna hong zang in. Topa aw, ka guh ka taang na mahmah ahih manin hong damsak in
Ka hin'gim mahmah hi. Topa aw, bang tanvei nang hong zekai lai ding na hi hiam
Topa aw, hong kihei in la, kei hong hon in. Itna kip a neipa na hih manin keimah hong hon in
Bang hang hiam cih leh misite omna gam sungah nangmah phawk theihna ding bangmah omlo ahih manin, Leinuai panin kua in nang hong phat thei ding ahi hiam
Ka tautauna-in ka gim hi. Zan sialin ka khitui in ka lupna tum a, ka kahkahna-in ka lupna kawt dikdek hi
Dahna hangin ka mit mial a, ka galte' hong bawlna hangin ka mitzung zaw semsem hi
Siatna a bawlte khempeuh aw, ka kiang panin kihemkhia un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka kahna aw a za hi
Topa in keima thumna hong za khinzo a, Topa in ka thungetna hong sang ta hi
Ka galte khempeuh zahhuai mahmahin genthei ding uh hi. Amaute nungkikin maizumna thuak pah ding uh hi.
